# סאנרייז ספא — Sunrise Spa

> Day spa and professional massage studio in Petah Tikva, Israel. Offering Thai, Swedish, deep tissue, couples massage, and reflexology. Certified therapists, intimate setting, walk-in distance from central Petah Tikva.

## Business details
- **Name (Hebrew):** סאנרייז ספא
- **Name (English):** Sunrise Spa
- **Address:** ההסתדרות 2, קומה 2, פתח תקווה (HaHistadrut 2, Floor 2, Petah Tikva), Israel
- **Postal code:** 4951447
- **Phone:** +972-58-658-8751
- **Website:** https://sunrisespa.biz/
- **Languages:** Hebrew (primary), English
- **Opening hours:**
  - Sunday–Thursday: 10:00–20:00
  - Friday: 09:00–15:00
  - Saturday: closed

## Services and prices (ILS)
- Body massage 45 min — ₪220 (Thai, Swedish, or deep tissue)
- Body massage 60 min — ₪270 (Thai, Swedish, or deep tissue)
- Body massage 90 min — ₪380 (Thai, Swedish, or deep tissue)
- Couples massage 60 min — ₪500
- Couples massage 90 min — ₪700
- Foot massage / reflexology 30 min — ₪150
- Foot massage / reflexology 60 min — ₪240

## Massage types offered
- **Thai massage** — traditional stretching and acupressure
- **Swedish massage** — long flowing strokes for relaxation
- **Deep tissue massage** — targeted work for chronic tension and pain
- **Couples massage** — two therapists, two beds, one room
- **Reflexology** — pressure-point work on the feet

## Booking
Contact via phone (+972-58-658-8751) or WhatsApp (https://wa.me/972586588751). Walk-ins welcome subject to availability.
